headline: UnitedHealth: Why It's Still Not Too Late To Buy The Turnaround

headline: CVS Lawsuit And Antitrust Scrutiny Put PBM Economics Under The Microscope
summary: A new class action lawsuit alleges CVS Health and its pharmacy benefit manager Caremark accepted kickbacks from drug manufacturers for preferred formulary placement. The suit centers on how drugs were selected and prioritized on Caremark managed formularies that influence what patients and health plans pay. At the same time, regulators and the FTC are increasing antitrust scrutiny of vertically integrated healthcare groups, including models like CVS that combine insurance, PBM, and retail...
